landing.title: Scholesa – Skills-First Learning OS
landing.subtitle: The operating system for K–12 schools and learning studios.
landing.tagline: Learn with purpose. Build future-ready skills every day.
landing.heroTitle: The proof engine for real capability growth.
landing.heroBody: Scholesa turns classroom moments into inspectable proof: observations, learner artifacts, explain-backs, rubric judgments, growth history, portfolios, reports, and partner deliverables all tied to the evidence that earned the claim.
landing.commandCenterSubtitle: Capture, verify, interpret, and communicate growth.
landing.commandCenterQuestion: Every view is designed to answer the same question: what can this learner do, and what evidence makes that claim trustworthy?

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue into your Scholesa workflow.
login.ssoUnavailable: No enterprise sign-in options are configured for this workspace.
login.ssoFailed: Enterprise sign-in failed. Contact your site or HQ administrator if the problem persists.
